title: AI Agent Frameworks: LangChain, AutoGPT, and CrewAI Compared
raw_html:
AI Agent Frameworks Comparison

The agent framework landscape is rapidly evolving. LangChain remains the most popular, but newer frameworks like CrewAI and AutoGPT offer specialized capabilities.

Framework Strengths

  • LangChain: Mature ecosystem, extensive integrations, strong community
  • AutoGPT: Autonomous task completion, minimal configuration
  • CrewAI: Multi-agent coordination, role-based architecture
  • Semantic Kernel: Enterprise-ready, Microsoft backing

Use Case Recommendations

For complex workflows: LangChain. For autonomous agents: AutoGPT. For multi-agent systems: CrewAI. For enterprise integration: Semantic Kernel.

Most teams benefit from starting with LangChain and evaluating alternatives as needs evolve.
